title: Parameter matrix: 2 seats + economy/dice overrides
goal: Verify client rehydrates session assumptions from manifest when seat/economy/dice values are changed together.
preconditions: Backend and web app are running or mock runtime is injected by Playwright.
Session manifest includes seat/economy/dice custom values.
assertions: Lobby join-seat options show only seat 1 and seat 2.
Match board snapshot rehydrates to configured tile count.
Recent message payload displays economy and dice overrides from parameter_manifest.
